params.dna: The DNA for the new Creature.

returns.creature: The address of the newly created Creature.

params.currentEpoch: The epoch number (used for offspring birthEpoch).

returns.newPopulation: The updated list of active Creature addresses after         deaths and births.

getFitness(address).notice: Get the fitness score for a creature from the last evolution run.

getLastScoredCreatures().notice: Get all scored creature addresses from the last evolution run.

injectSeed((uint8,uint8,uint16,uint16,ui.notice: Inject a new seed Creature with externally generated DNA.         Only callable by the authorized seeder address.

lastFitnessScores(address).notice: Per-creature fitness scores from the last evolution run.

mutationRate().notice: Probability of mutation per gene field (basis points).

runEvolution(address[],uint256).notice: Run a full evolution cycle on the given set of Creatures.         Called by Ecosystem at each epoch transition.

seeder().notice: Address authorized to inject seed Creatures (AI Seeder).

survivalThreshold().notice: Top N% survive and may become parents (basis points).
